text: Build RSS subscription engine for agent information streams
description: Implement subscription management system where agent can subscribe to RSS/Atom feeds and check them during DISCOVERING state. Store subscriptions in .bowman/subscriptions.json with feed URL, tags, check frequency, last checked timestamp. During discovery, fetch new items from feeds and generate aims or context from relevant content. Examples: blog posts about tech stack, library release notes, documentation updates.

status.comment: Enables agent to pull external context
